title: Mahmood Mamdani, Father of NYC Mayor, Is Writing a Book on Gaza
summary_full: At once, Mahmood Mamdani’s fame was eclipsed by his son’s. At the same time, the election of Zohran Mamdani has attracted new interest in his father’s work.
